channel.title: Proxy on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Proxy on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Web Proxy in 2026: Squid vs Tinyproxy vs Caddy
item.description: Running your own web proxy gives you full control over how your network traffic flows. Whether you want to cache frequently accessed content to reduce bandwidth, filter outbound requests for compliance, anonymize your browsing traffic, or reverse-proxy multiple backend services behind a single entry point, a self-hosted proxy is the cornerstone of a well-managed network.
